sentences.sentence: English primary school pupils subjected to more tests than in any other country.
sentences.translation: 英国小学生承受的考试多于其他任何国家的小学生。

structure.text: English primary school pupils
subjected to more tests than in any other country

difficult_points: 本句是标题式残句，pupils 后缺少 are，subjected 是过去分词。
more...than... 比较英国与其他国家的考试数量。

sentences.sentence: English primary school pupils have to deal with unprecedented levels of pressure as they face tests more frequently, at a younger age, and in more subjects than children from any other country, according to one of the biggest international education inquiries in decades.
sentences.translation: 一项数十年来规模最大的国际教育调查显示，英国小学生面临前所未有的压力：与其他任何国家的孩子相比，他们考试更频繁、开始年龄更小、涉及科目更多。

structure.text: English primary school pupils have to deal with unprecedented levels of pressure
as they face tests more frequently, at a younger age, and in more subjects than children from any other country
according to one of the biggest international education inquiries in decades

difficult_points: as 引导原因从句，三个比较维度 more frequently、at a younger age、in more subjects 并列。
than children... 在语意上同时服务于三个比较项。

expressions.text: deal with unprecedented levels of pressure

sentences.sentence: The damning indictment of England's primary education system revealed that the country's children are now the most tested in the world.
sentences.translation: 这份对英格兰小学教育体系的严厉批评显示，该国儿童如今是世界上接受考试最多的群体。

structure.text: The damning indictment of England's primary education system revealed
that the country's children are now the most tested in the world

difficult_points: that 从句作 revealed 的宾语，说明调查揭示的结论。
the most tested 是过去分词形容词化，表示接受考试最多。

sentences.sentence: From their very earliest days at school they must navigate a set-up whose trademark is 'high stakes' testing, according to a recent report
sentences.translation: 一份近期报告称，孩子从入学最初阶段起就必须适应一个以“高风险”考试为标志的制度。

structure.text: From their very earliest days at school they must navigate a set-up
whose trademark is 'high stakes' testing
according to a recent report

difficult_points: whose 引导定语从句修饰 set-up，表示该制度的标志。
navigate 是比喻用法，意为设法适应；原文无句末标点。

sentences.sentence: Parents are encouraged to choose schools for their children based on league tables of test scores.
sentences.translation: 家长被鼓励根据考试成绩排行榜为孩子选择学校。

structure.text: Parents are encouraged
to choose schools for their children based on league tables of test scores

difficult_points: are encouraged to 是被动结构，表示制度引导家长这样做。
based on... 是过去分词短语，修饰选择学校所依据的标准。

sentences.sentence: But this puts children under extreme pressure which could damage their motivation and self-esteem, as well as encouraging schools to 'teach to the test' at the expense of pupils' wider learning, the study found.
sentences.translation: 但研究发现，这会让孩子承受巨大压力，可能损害其学习动力和自尊；同时还会鼓励学校以牺牲学生更广泛的学习为代价“应试教学”。

structure.text: this puts children under extreme pressure
which could damage their motivation and self-esteem
as well as encouraging schools to 'teach to the test' at the expense of pupils' wider learning
the study found

difficult_points: which 指 extreme pressure，并说明其潜在伤害。
as well as encouraging... 与 damaging... 并列；at the expense of 表示以更广泛学习为代价。

sentences.sentence: The findings are part of a two-year inquiry – led by Cambridge University – into English primary schools.
sentences.translation: 这些发现来自一项由剑桥大学牵头、为期两年的英格兰小学调查。

structure.text: The findings are part of a two-year inquiry
led by Cambridge University
into English primary schools

difficult_points: 破折号中的 led by... 修饰 inquiry。
into English primary schools 说明调查对象。

expressions.text: be part of an inquiry into
expressions.meaning_zh: 是一项关于……调查的一部分

sentences.sentence: Other parts of the UK and countries such as France, Norway and Japan used testing but it was,'less intrusive, less comprehensive, and considerably less frequent', Cambridge's Primary Review concluded.
sentences.translation: 剑桥小学教育评审项目总结称，英国其他地区以及法国、挪威和日本等国也使用考试，但其干预性更低、覆盖面较小，频率也低得多。

structure.text: Other parts of the UK and countries such as France, Norway and Japan used testing
but it was,'less intrusive, less comprehensive, and considerably less frequent'
Cambridge's Primary Review concluded

difficult_points: it 指其他地区和国家所采用的 testing。
三个 less 构成并列比较；原文 was 后逗号与引号位置异常。

sentences.sentence: England was unique in using testing to control what is taught in schools, to monitor teaching standards and to encourage parents to choose schools based on the results of the tests, according to Kathy Hall, from the National University of Ireland in Cork, and Kamil Ozerk, from the University of Oslo, who conducted the research.
sentences.translation: 开展该研究的爱尔兰国立大学科克分校凯西·霍尔和奥斯陆大学卡米尔·奥泽克指出，英格兰独特之处在于用考试控制学校教授的内容、监督教学标准，并鼓励家长根据考试结果择校。

structure.text: England was unique in using testing to control what is taught in schools, to monitor teaching standards and to encourage parents to choose schools based on the results of the tests
according to Kathy Hall, from the National University of Ireland in Cork, and Kamil Ozerk, from the University of Oslo
who conducted the research

difficult_points: using testing 后有三个并列目的不定式 control、monitor、encourage。
what is taught... 是 control 的宾语从句；who 指两位研究者。

sentences.sentence: 'Assessment in England, compared to our other reviewed countries, is pervasive, highly consequential, and taken by officialdom and the public more generally to portray objectively the actual quality of primary education in schools,'their report concluded.
sentences.translation: 他们的报告总结道：“与我们评审的其他国家相比，英格兰的评估无处不在、后果重大，而且被官方乃至公众普遍视为能够客观呈现学校小学教育实际质量的工具。”

structure.text: Assessment in England, compared to our other reviewed countries, is pervasive, highly consequential, and taken by officialdom and the public more generally to portray objectively the actual quality of primary education in schools
their report concluded

difficult_points: compared to... 是过去分词比较短语；pervasive、consequential 和 taken 是并列表语。
taken...to portray 可理解为“被视为能呈现”；原文关闭引号与 their 之间缺少空格。

sentences.sentence: Teachers' leaders said the testing regime was 'past its sell-by date' and called for a fundamental review of assessment
sentences.translation: 教师组织负责人称，这套考试制度已经“过时”，并呼吁对评估体系进行根本性审查。

structure.text: Teachers' leaders said the testing regime was 'past its sell-by date'
and called for a fundamental review of assessment

difficult_points: said 后省略 that；call for 表示公开要求。
past its sell-by date 原指食品过保质期，此处比喻制度过时；原文无句末标点。

sentences.sentence: Steve Sinnott, General Secretary of the National Union of Teachers, said England's testing system was having a 'devastating' impact on schools.'Uniquely, England is a country where testing is used to police schools and control what is taught,' he said.'When it comes to testing in England, the tail wags the dog.
sentences.translation: 全国教师工会总书记史蒂夫·辛诺特说，英格兰的考试制度正对学校造成“毁灭性”影响。“英格兰是一个独特的国家，考试被用来管控学校并控制教学内容，”他说，“谈到英格兰的考试，完全是本末倒置。”

structure.text: Steve Sinnott, General Secretary of the National Union of Teachers, said England's testing system was having a 'devastating' impact on schools
'Uniquely, England is a country where testing is used to police schools and control what is taught,' he said
'When it comes to testing in England, the tail wags the dog

difficult_points: where 修饰 country，what is taught 是 control 的宾语从句。
the tail wags the dog 是习语，指次要因素反过来支配主要目标。
原文 schools.'Uniquely 与 said.'When 之间均无空格，为保证原文复现合并为一条记录；最后引语未关闭。

sentences.sentence: It is patently absurd that even the structure and content of education is shaped by the demands of the tests.
sentences.translation: 甚至连教育的结构和内容都由考试要求塑造，这显然荒谬。

structure.text: It is patently absurd
that even the structure and content of education is shaped by the demands of the tests

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
structure and content 是并列主语，原文却使用单数 is，存在主谓一致问题。

sentences.sentence: I call on the Government to initiate a full and independent review of the impact of the current testing system on schools and on children's learning and to be prepared to dismantle a system which is long past its sell-by date.'
sentences.translation: 我呼吁政府启动一次全面、独立的审查，评估现行考试制度对学校和儿童学习的影响，并准备拆除一套早已过时的制度。”

structure.text: I call on the Government
to initiate a full and independent review of the impact of the current testing system on schools and on children's learning
and to be prepared to dismantle a system which is long past its sell-by date

difficult_points: call on someone to do 表示呼吁某人行动，两个 to 不定式并列。
which 修饰 system；句末引号关闭上一条中未关闭的引语。

sentences.sentence: John Dunford, General Secretary of the Association of School and College Leaders, warned that the tests were having a damaging effect on pupils.
sentences.translation: 学校与学院领导人协会总书记约翰·邓福德警告说，考试正对学生造成有害影响。

structure.text: John Dunford, General Secretary of the Association of School and College Leaders, warned
that the tests were having a damaging effect on pupils

difficult_points: General Secretary... 与 John Dunford 同位。
that 从句作 warned 的宾语，were having 强调持续影响。

sentences.sentence: The whole testing regime is governed by the need to produce league tables,' he said.
sentences.translation: “整个考试制度都受制作排行榜这一需求支配，”他说。

structure.text: The whole testing regime is governed by the need to produce league tables
he said

difficult_points: is governed by 是被动语态，表示制度被某种需求主导。
to produce league tables 修饰 need；原文缺少开引号，仅有关闭引号。

expressions.text: be governed by the need to

sentences.sentence: 'It has more to do with holding schools to account than helping pupils to progress.'
sentences.translation: “它更多是为了追究学校责任，而不是帮助学生进步。”

structure.text: It has more to do with holding schools to account
than helping pupils to progress

difficult_points: more to do with...than... 比较制度的两个真实目的。
hold schools to account 表示要求学校为结果负责。

expressions.text: have more to do with ... than

sentences.sentence: The fear that many children were suffering intolerable stress because of the tests was voiced by Mick Brookes, General Secretary of the National Association of Head Teachers.
sentences.translation: 全国校长协会总书记米克·布鲁克斯表达了这样的担忧：许多孩子正因考试承受难以忍受的压力。

structure.text: The fear that many children were suffering intolerable stress because of the tests
was voiced by Mick Brookes, General Secretary of the National Association of Head Teachers

difficult_points: that 从句同位说明 fear 的具体内容。
General Secretary... 与 Mick Brookes 同位，was voiced by 是被动结构。

sentences.sentence: There are schools that start rehearsing for key stage two SATs [Standard Assessment Tests] from the moment the children arrive in September.
sentences.translation: 有些学校从孩子九月入学的那一刻起，就开始为第二关键阶段SAT考试［标准评估测试］进行演练。

structure.text: There are schools
that start rehearsing for key stage two SATs [Standard Assessment Tests] from the moment the children arrive in September

difficult_points: that 修饰 schools；start 后接动名词 rehearsing。
the moment 后直接接时间从句，等同于 as soon as。

sentences.sentence: That's just utterly ridiculous/ he said.
sentences.translation: “这简直荒谬透顶。”他说。

structure.text: That's just utterly ridiculous
he said

difficult_points: utterly 加强 ridiculous 的程度。
原文用斜杠 / 代替了应有的引号或逗号，予以保留。

sentences.sentence: There are other schools that rehearse SATs during Christmas week.
sentences.translation: 另有一些学校甚至在圣诞周演练SAT考试。

structure.text: There are other schools
that rehearse SATs during Christmas week

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 other schools。
during Christmas week 突出备考侵占假期。

sentences.sentence: These are young children we are talking about.
sentences.translation: 我们谈论的可是年幼的孩子。

structure.text: These are young children
we are talking about

difficult_points: children 后省略关系代词 whom/that，we are talking about 修饰它。
These 回指参加关键阶段考试的小学生，语气强调其年龄。

expressions.text: the children we are talking about

sentences.sentence: They should be having the time of their lives at school not just worrying about tests.
sentences.translation: 他们本应在学校度过人生中最快乐的时光，而不是只顾担心考试。

structure.text: They should be having the time of their lives at school
not just worrying about tests

difficult_points: should be having 表示本应处于的理想状态。
原文 school 与 not 之间缺少逗号；not just 与前项构成对比但缺少 but。

expressions.text: have the time of their lives

sentences.sentence: It is the breadth and richness of the curriculum that suffers.
sentences.translation: 真正受到损害的是课程的广度和丰富性。

structure.text: It is the breadth and richness of the curriculum
that suffers

difficult_points: It is...that... 是强调句，强调受损对象。
suffers 使用单数与最近的整体概念搭配，指课程品质受损。

sentences.sentence: The consequences for schools not reaching their targets are dire – heads can lose their jobs and schools can be closed down.
sentences.translation: 学校未达到指标的后果十分严重——校长可能失业，学校也可能被关闭。

structure.text: The consequences for schools not reaching their targets are dire
heads can lose their jobs and schools can be closed down

difficult_points: not reaching... 是现在分词修饰 schools。
heads 指 head teachers，即校长；破折号后具体说明 dire consequences。

sentences.sentence: With this at stake it's not surprising that schools let the tests take over.'
sentences.translation: 在这些利害攸关的情况下，学校任由考试主导一切也就不足为奇了。”

structure.text: With this at stake
it's not surprising
that schools let the tests take over

difficult_points: With this at stake 是 with 复合结构，this 指工作和学校存续等利益。
it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语；let 后接原形 take over。

sentences.sentence: David Laws, the Liberal Democrat schools spokesman, said 'The uniquely high stakes placed on national tests mean that many primary schools have become too exam focused.'
sentences.translation: 自由民主党学校事务发言人大卫·劳斯说：“全国统考所承载的独特高风险，意味着许多小学已变得过度以考试为中心。”

structure.text: David Laws, the Liberal Democrat schools spokesman, said
The uniquely high stakes placed on national tests mean that many primary schools have become too exam focused

difficult_points: the Liberal Democrat schools spokesman 与人名同位。
placed on national tests 修饰 stakes；mean 后 that 从句说明结果。

sentences.sentence: However, the Government rejected the criticism.
sentences.translation: 然而，政府否认了这种批评。

structure.text: However
the Government rejected the criticism

difficult_points: However 转折到政府立场。
the criticism 回指考试过多、学校过度应试的指责。

sentences.sentence: The idea that children are over-tested is not a view that the Government accepts/a spokesman said.
sentences.translation: 一名发言人说：“政府不接受儿童考试过多这一观点。”

structure.text: The idea that children are over-tested is not a view that the Government accepts
a spokesman said

difficult_points: 第一个 that 同位说明 idea，第二个 that 引导定语从句修饰 view。
原文用斜杠 / 连接引语与报道语，缺少规范引号和逗号。

sentences.sentence: The reality is that children spend a very small percentage of their time in school being tested.
sentences.translation: 实际情况是，儿童在校接受考试的时间只占很小比例。

structure.text: The reality is
that children spend a very small percentage of their time in school being tested

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，说明 reality 的内容。
spend time being tested 表示把时间用于接受考试，being tested 是被动动名词。

sentences.sentence: Seeing that children leave school up to the right standard in the basics is the highest priority of the Government.'
sentences.translation: 确保儿童离校时基础知识达到应有标准，是政府的最高优先事项。”

structure.text: Seeing that children leave school up to the right standard in the basics
is the highest priority of the Government

difficult_points: Seeing that... 在此是动名词结构作主语，意为确保某事发生。
up to the right standard 表示达到合适标准；句末只有关闭引号。

sentences.sentence: In another child-centred initiative, both major political parties in the UK – Labour and the Conservatives – have announced plans to make Britain more child-friendly following a report by UNICEF which ranked the UK the worst place to be a child out of 21 rich nations.
sentences.translation: 在另一项以儿童为中心的倡议中，英国两大政党——工党和保守党——在联合国儿童基金会一份报告之后宣布了使英国更加儿童友好的计划；该报告把英国列为21个富裕国家中最不适合儿童生活的地方。

structure.text: both major political parties in the UK – Labour and the Conservatives – have announced plans to make Britain more child-friendly
following a report by UNICEF
which ranked the UK the worst place to be a child out of 21 rich nations

difficult_points: 破折号内 Labour and the Conservatives 与 both major political parties 同位。
which 修饰 report；rank + 宾语 + 补语表示把英国评为某种位置。

sentences.sentence: Parents were warned that they risked creating a generation of 'battery-farmed children' by always keeping them indoors to ensure their safety.
sentences.translation: 家长受到警告：总为确保安全而把孩子关在室内，可能会造就一代像“笼养”般长大的儿童。

structure.text: Parents were warned
that they risked creating a generation of 'battery-farmed children' by always keeping them indoors to ensure their safety

difficult_points: risk doing 表示冒险造成某种结果；by keeping... 说明造成结果的方式。
battery-farmed 原指笼养动物，此处比喻被过度保护的儿童；两个 them/their 均指 children。

sentences.sentence: The family's minister, Kevin Brennan, called for an end to the 'cotton wool' culture and warned that children would not learn to cope with risks if they were never allowed to play outdoors.
sentences.translation: 家庭事务部长凯文·布伦南呼吁终结这种“棉花包裹式”文化，并警告说，如果孩子从不被允许在户外玩耍，就学不会应对风险。

structure.text: The family's minister, Kevin Brennan, called for an end to the 'cotton wool' culture
and warned that children would not learn to cope with risks if they were never allowed to play outdoors

difficult_points: Kevin Brennan 与 The family's minister 同位；原文 family's minister 是非常规表达。
that 从句作 warned 的宾语，其中 if 引导条件从句；were allowed to 是被动结构。
